channel.title: Patriots Portfolio on The Tradewinds Brief
channel.description: Recent content in Patriots Portfolio on The Tradewinds Brief

item.title: Patriots Portfolio: The Rush on Gas Cylinders, the CANU Seizure Hedge, and Why 'Be!' Pay Was Never a Good Idea
item.description:
Good Friday morning to all the serious money in Guyana. Finance Ferrari here with your weekly read on where the smart rupees are flowing, where the dumb rupees are flowing, and where the rupees are just gone — possibly into a “Be!” Pay wallet that no longer opens.

Let’s get into it.

📈 HOT THIS WEEK: Gas Cylinders and Canned Goods

Following President Ali’s announcement that cross-sector price increases are coming, the Patriots Portfolio panel has observed an unusual uptick in panic-buying across Georgetown and the East Coast. Specifically:

item.title: Patriots Portfolio – Friday, April 3, 2026
item.description: This week's Patriots Portfolio — what the 38% Trump tariff means for Guyana's economy, the Wales Gas Plant arbitration fallout, Exxon's Canje exit, and what patriotic investors need to watch.

item.title: Patriots Portfolio — March 24, 2026: Oil, Courts, and the Business of Everything
item.description: This week in Guyana's business and economic landscape: Exxon's production push, rising oil prices, the NRF, and what the Mohameds saga means for business confidence.

item.title: Patriots Portfolio — Week of March 19, 2026
item.description: Your weekly satirical investment guide to the Guyanese national situation. Buy, Sell, or Hold.
